message:
Add Rounds 3-5 optimization levers: identity-alignment fast path, dense Int64 groupby, and lazy has_duplicates memoization

Round 3: Guarded identity-alignment fast path in groupby_sum skips
reindexing when keys and values share the same duplicate-free index.
Round 4: Dense Int64 bucket aggregation path with bounded range fallback
for groupby_sum, preserving first-seen key order.
Round 5: Lazy has_duplicates memoization via OnceCell in fp-index, with
label-only Index equality to guarantee semantic parity. Benchmark delta:
0.2906s -> 0.0372s (~87.2% faster on groupby workload).

Also hardens .gitignore for perf.data globs, flamegraph.svg, and
round artifact SVGs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,8 @@
 /.target
 /.target-opt
 **/*.rs.bk
-perf.data
+perf.data*
+flamegraph.svg
 
 # Temporary/local runtime state
 /.tmp/
@@ -44,3 +45,4 @@ artifacts/perf/round*_packet_hyperfine.json
 artifacts/perf/round*_packet_strace.txt
 artifacts/perf/round*_*.json
 artifacts/perf/round*_*.txt
+artifacts/perf/round*_*.svg
